name: claude-mascot
description: A tsundere cat mascot (and friends) reacting to Claude Code activity in a tmux pane

character.title: Character
character.description: Which mascot character to display (nabi | fubao)

paneHeight.title: Pane Height
paneHeight.description: Height of the tmux pane in rows (8–30)

stopHookEnabled.title: Stop Hook Enabled
stopHookEnabled.description: Auto-update mascot emotion at end of each Claude response

startupEmotion.title: Startup Emotion
startupEmotion.description: Emotion shown when a new session starts (neutral | happy | angry | shy | sad | surprised | love)
